none)\n\t*/\n\tgetStrategies(target) {\n\t\tconst body = this.resolveTarget(target);\n\t\tconst entry = this.entries.get(body.id);\n\t\treturn entry ? entry.strategies.map((e) => e.strategy) : [];\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates all registered strategies.\n\t*\n\t* Call this method once per frame before `PhysicsEngine.step()` so that the\n\t* physics simulation integrates the velocities that strategies configure.\n\t* \n\t* This method handles the movement lifecycle:\n\t* - Triggers `onStart` callback on first update\n\t* - Calls `strategy.update()` each frame\n\t* - When `isFinished()` returns true:\n\t*   - Calls `strategy.onFinished()` if defined\n\t*   - Triggers `onComplete` callback\n\t*   - Resolves the Promise returned by `add()`\n\t*\n\t* @param dt - Time delta in seconds\n\t*/\n\tupdate(dt) {\n\t\tfor (const [key, entry] of this.entries) {\n\t\t\tconst { body, strategies } = entry;\n\t\t\tif (strategies.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.entries.delete(key);\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor (let i = strategies.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) {\n\t\t\t\tconst strategyEntry = strategies[i];\n\t\t\t\tif (!strategyEntry) continue;\n\t\t\t\tconst { strategy, options, resolve } = strategyEntry;\n\t\t\t\tif (!strategyEntry.started) {\n\t\t\t\t\tstrategyEntry.started = true;\n\t\t\t\t\toptions?.onStart?.();\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tstrategy.update(body, dt);\n\t\t\t\tif (strategy.isFinished?.()) {\n\t\t\t\t\tstrategies.splice(i, 1);\n\t\t\t\t\tstrategy.onFinished?.();\n\t\t\t\t\toptions?.onComplete?.();\n\t\t\t\t\tresolve?.();\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (strategies.length === 0) this.entries.delete(key);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes all strategies from all entities.\n\t*/\n\tclearAll() {\n\t\tthis.entries.clear();\n\t}\n\tresolveTarget(target) {\n\t\tif (this.isMovementBody(target)) return target;\n\t\tif (target instanceof Entity) return this.wrapEntity(target);\n\t\tif (!this.resolveEntity) throw new Error(\"MovementManager: cannot resolve entity from identifier without a resolver.\");\n\t\tconst entity = this.resolveEntity(target);\n\t\tif (!entity) throw new Error(`MovementManager: unable to resolve entity for identifier ${target}.`);\n\t\treturn entity;\n\t}\n\twrapEntity(entity) {\n\t\tlet wrapper = this.entityWrappers.get(entity);\n\t\tif (!wrapper) {\n\t\t\twrapper = new EntityMovementBody(entity);\n\t\t\tthis.entityWrappers.set(entity, wrapper);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn wrapper;\n\t}\n\tisMovementBody(value) {\n\t\treturn Boolean(value && typeof value === \"object\" && \"id\" in value && \"setVelocity\" in value && typeof value.setVelocity === \"function\");\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/api/ZoneManager.ts\n/**\n* Zone manager for detecting entities within circular/cone-shaped areas.\n*\n* Zones can be used for vision, skill ranges, explosions, and other gameplay mechanics\n* that need to detect entities without physical collisions.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const engine = new PhysicsEngine({ timeStep: 1/60 });\n* const zones = new ZoneManager(engine);\n*\n* // Create a static zone\n* const zoneId = zones.createZone({\n*   position: { x: 100, y: 100 },\n*   radius: 50,\n*   onEnter: (entities) => console.log('Entities entered:', entities),\n* });\n*\n* // Create a zone attached to an entity\n* const player = engine.createEntity({ position: { x: 0, y: 0 }, radius: 10 });\n* const visionZone = zones.createAttachedZone(player, {\n*   radius: 100,\n*   angle: 90,\n*   direction: 'right',\n*   onEnter: (entities) => console.log('Player sees:', entities),\n* });\n*\n* // Update zones after each physics step\n* engine.step();\n* zones.update();\n* ```\n*/\nvar ZoneManager = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new zone manager\n\t*\n\t* @param engine - Physics engine instance\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(engine) {\n\t\tthis.zones = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n\t\tthis.engine = engine;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new zone\n\t*\n\t* @param config - Zone configuration\n\t* @param callbacks - Optional event callbacks\n\t* @returns Zone identifier\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const zoneId = zones.createZone({\n\t*   position: { x: 100, y: 100 },\n\t*   radius: 50,\n\t*   angle: 180,\n\t*   direction: 'right',\n\t* }, {\n\t*   onEnter: (entities) => console.log('Entered:', entities),\n\t*   onExit: (entities) => console.log('Exited:', entities),\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tcreateZone(config, callbacks) {\n\t\tconst id = generateUUID();\n\t\tconst radius = config.radius;\n\t\tif (typeof radius !== \"number\" || radius <= 0) throw new Error(\"Zone radius must be a positive number\");\n\t\tconst angle = config.angle ?? 360;\n\t\tconst direction = config.direction ?? \"down\";\n\t\tconst limitedByWalls = config.limitedByWalls ?? false;\n\t\tlet position;\n\t\tlet type;\n\t\tlet attachedEntity;\n\t\tlet offset;\n\t\tif (\"entity\" in config) {\n\t\t\ttype = \"attached\";\n\t\t\tattachedEntity = config.entity;\n\t\t\tconst entityPos = attachedEntity.position;\n\t\t\tconst offsetValue = config.offset ?? {\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tif (offsetValue instanceof Vector2) offset = offsetValue.clone();\n\t\t\telse offset = new Vector2(offsetValue.x, offsetValue.y);\n\t\t\tposition = new Vector2(entityPos.x + offset.x, entityPos.y + offset.y);\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\ttype = \"static\";\n\t\t\tconst pos = config.position;\n\t\t\tif (pos instanceof Vector2) position = pos.clone();\n\t\t\telse position = new Vector2(pos.x, pos.y);\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst record = {\n\t\t\tid,\n\t\t\ttype,\n\t\t\tposition,\n\t\t\tradius,\n\t\t\tangle,\n\t\t\tdirection,\n\t\t\tlimitedByWalls,\n\t\t\tmetadata: config.metadata,\n\t\t\tattachedEntity,\n\t\t\toffset,\n\t\t\tcallbacks,\n\t\t\tinside: /* @__PURE__ */ new Set()\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.zones.set(id, record);\n\t\treturn id;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a zone attached to an entity (convenience method)\n\t*\n\t* @param entity - Entity to attach the zone to\n\t* @param config - Zone configuration\n\t* @param callbacks - Optional event callbacks\n\t* @returns Zone identifier\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const visionZone = zones.createAttachedZone(player, {\n\t*   radius: 100,\n\t*   angle: 90,\n\t*   direction: 'right',\n\t*   offset: { x: 0, y: -10 },\n\t* }, {\n\t*   onEnter: (entities) => console.log('Player sees:', entities),\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tcreateAttachedZone(entity, config, callbacks) {\n\t\treturn this.createZone({\n\t\t\t...config,\n\t\t\tentity\n\t\t}, callbacks);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates a zone's configuration\n\t*\n\t* @param id - Zone identifier\n\t* @param updates - Partial configuration updates\n\t* @returns True if the zone was found and updated\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* zones.updateZone(zoneId, { radius: 75, angle: 120 });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tupdateZone(id, updates) {\n\t\tconst zone = this.zones.get(id);\n\t\tif (!zone) return false;\n\t\tif (updates.radius !== void 0) {\n\t\t\tif (typeof updates.radius !== \"number\" || updates.radius <= 0) throw new Error(\"Zone radius must be a positive number\");\n\t\t\tzone.radius = updates.radius;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (updates.angle !== void 0) zone.angle = updates.angle;\n\t\tif (updates.direction !== void 0) zone.direction = updates.direction;\n\t\tif (updates.limitedByWalls !== void 0) zone.limitedByWalls = updates.limitedByWalls;\n\t\tif (updates.metadata !== void 0) zone.metadata = updates.metadata;\n\t\tif (\"offset\" in updates && updates.offset !== void 0 && zone.type === \"attached\") {\n\t\t\tconst offsetValue = updates.offset;\n\t\t\tif (offsetValue instanceof Vector2) zone.offset = offsetValue.clone();\n\t\t\telse zone.offset = new Vector2(offsetValue.x, offsetValue.y);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Registers or updates callbacks for a zone\n\t*\n\t* @param id - Zone identifier\n\t* @param callbacks - Event callbacks\n\t* @returns True if the zone was found\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* zones.registerCallbacks(zoneId, {\n\t*   onEnter: (entities) => console.log('Entered:', entities),\n\t*   onExit: (entities) => console.log('Exited:', entities),\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tregisterCallbacks(id, callbacks) {\n\t\tconst zone = this.zones.get(id);\n\t\tif (!zone) return false;\n\t\tzone.callbacks = callbacks;\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes a zone\n\t*\n\t* @param id - Zone identifier\n\t* @returns True if the zone was found and removed\n\t*/\n\tremoveZone(id) {\n\t\treturn this.zones.delete(id);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets zone information\n\t*\n\t* @param id - Zone identifier\n\t* @returns Zone information or undefined\n\t*/\n\tgetZone(id) {\n\t\tconst zone = this.zones.get(id);\n\t\tif (!zone) return void 0;\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\tid: zone.id,\n\t\t\ttype: zone.type,\n\t\t\tposition: zone.position.clone(),\n\t\t\tradius: zone.radius,\n\t\t\tangle: zone.angle,\n\t\t\tdirection: zone.direction,\n\t\t\tlimitedByWalls: zone.limitedByWalls,\n\t\t\tmetadata: zone.metadata\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all entities currently inside a zone\n\t*\n\t* @param id - Zone identifier\n\t* @returns Array of entities inside the zone\n\t*/\n\tgetEntitiesInZone(id) {\n\t\tconst zone = this.zones.get(id);\n\t\tif (!zone) return [];\n\t\tconst entities = [];\n\t\tfor (const uuid of zone.inside) {\n\t\t\tconst entity = this.engine.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\tif (entity) entities.push(entity);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn entities;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all zone identifiers\n\t*\n\t* @returns Array of zone IDs\n\t*/\n\tgetAllZoneIds() {\n\t\treturn Array.from(this.zones.keys());\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clears all zones\n\t*/\n\tclear() {\n\t\tthis.zones.clear();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates all zones, detecting entities entering/exiting\n\t*\n\t* This should be called after each physics step to keep zones synchronized.\n\t*\n\t* @param _deltaTime - Optional delta time (not used currently, but kept for future use)\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* engine.step();\n\t* zones.update();\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tupdate(_deltaTime) {\n\t\tfor (const zone of this.zones.values()) {\n\t\t\tif (zone.type === \"attached\" && zone.attachedEntity) {\n\t\t\t\tconst entityPos = zone.attachedEntity.position;\n\t\t\t\tconst offset = zone.offset ?? new Vector2(0, 0);\n\t\t\t\tzone.position.set(entityPos.x + offset.x, entityPos.y + offset.y);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tconst aabb = new AABB(zone.position.x - zone.radius, zone.position.y - zone.radius, zone.position.x + zone.radius, zone.position.y + zone.radius);\n\t\t\tconst candidates = this.engine.queryAABB(aabb);\n\t\t\tconst hits = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\t\tfor (const entity of candidates) {\n\t\t\t\tif (zone.attachedEntity && entity.uuid === zone.attachedEntity.uuid) continue;\n\t\t\t\tif (this.isEntityInsideZone(zone, entity)) hits.add(entity.uuid);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tconst previous = zone.inside;\n\t\t\tconst entered = [];\n\t\t\tconst exited = [];\n\t\t\tfor (const uuid of hits) if (!previous.has(uuid)) {\n\t\t\t\tconst entity = this.engine.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\t\tif (entity) entered.push(entity);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfor (const uuid of previous) if (!hits.has(uuid)) {\n\t\t\t\tconst entity = this.engine.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\t\tif (entity) exited.push(entity);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tzone.inside = hits;\n\t\t\tif (entered.length > 0 && zone.callbacks?.onEnter) zone.callbacks.onEnter(entered);\n\t\t\tif (exited.length > 0 && zone.callbacks?.onExit) zone.callbacks.onExit(exited);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if an entity is inside a zone\n\t*\n\t* @param zone - Zone record\n\t* @param entity - Entity to check\n\t* @returns True if the entity is inside the zone\n\t*/\n\tisEntityInsideZone(zone, entity) {\n\t\tconst zonePos = zone.position;\n\t\tconst entityPos = entity.position;\n\t\tconst dx = entityPos.x - zonePos.x;\n\t\tconst dy = entityPos.y - zonePos.y;\n\t\tif (Math.hypot(dx, dy) - (entity.radius > 0 ? entity.radius : Math.max(entity.width, entity.height) / 2) > zone.radius) return false;\n\t\tif (zone.angle < 360) {\n\t\t\tconst facing = this.directionToAngle(zone.direction);\n\t\t\tconst angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\n\t\t\tconst delta = this.normalizeAngle(angle - facing);\n\t\t\tconst halfAperture = zone.angle * Math.PI / 360;\n\t\t\tif (Math.abs(delta) > halfAperture) return false;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (zone.limitedByWalls) {\n\t\t\tif (!this.hasLineOfSight(zonePos, entityPos, entity.uuid)) return false;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn true;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Checks if there's a clear line of sight between two points\n\t*\n\t* @param start - Start position\n\t* @param end - End position\n\t* @param ignoreEntityId - Entity UUID to ignore (usually the target entity)\n\t* @returns True if line of sight is clear\n\t*/\n\thasLineOfSight(start, end, ignoreEntityId) {\n\t\tconst direction = end.sub(start);\n\t\tconst distance = direction.length();\n\t\tif (distance < 1e-5) return true;\n\t\tdirection.normalizeInPlace();\n\t\treturn this.engine.raycast(start, direction, distance, void 0, (entity) => {\n\t\t\tif (!entity.isStatic()) return false;\n\t\t\tif (ignoreEntityId && entity.uuid === ignoreEntityId) return false;\n\t\t\treturn true;\n\t\t}) === null;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Converts direction string to angle in radians\n\t*\n\t* @param dir - Direction\n\t* @returns Angle in radians\n\t*/\n\tdirectionToAngle(dir) {\n\t\tswitch (dir) {\n\t\t\tcase \"up\": return -Math.PI / 2;\n\t\t\tcase \"down\": return Math.PI / 2;\n\t\t\tcase \"left\": return Math.PI;\n\t\t\tdefault: return 0;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Normalizes angle to [-π, π]\n\t*\n\t* @param angle - Angle in radians\n\t* @returns Normalized angle\n\t*/\n\tnormalizeAngle(angle) {\n\t\tlet a = angle;\n\t\twhile (a > Math.PI) a -= Math.PI * 2;\n\t\twhile (a < -Math.PI) a += Math.PI * 2;\n\t\treturn a;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/api/PhysicsEngine.ts\n/**\n* Main physics engine interface\n* \n* Provides a high-level, gameplay-oriented API for physics simulation.\n* Supports both single-world and multi-region simulation modes.\n* \n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const engine = new PhysicsEngine({ timeStep: 1/60 });\n* const entity = engine.createEntity({\n*   position: { x: 0, y: 0 },\n*   radius: 10,\n*   mass: 1\n* });\n* \n* engine.step();\n* ```\n*/\nvar PhysicsEngine = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new physics engine\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Engine configuration\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(config = {}) {\n\t\tthis.regionManager = null;\n\t\tthis.movementManager = null;\n\t\tthis.zoneManager = null;\n\t\tthis.tick = 0;\n\t\tthis.useRegions = config.enableRegions ?? false;\n\t\tif (this.useRegions) {\n\t\t\tif (!config.regionConfig) throw new Error(\"Region configuration is required when enableRegions is true\");\n\t\t\tthis.regionManager = new RegionManager(config.regionConfig);\n\t\t\tthis.world = new World({\n\t\t\t\t...config,\n\t\t\t\tenableSleep: false\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t} else this.world = new World(config);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the movement manager bound to this engine.\n\t*\n\t* The manager is lazily created and reused.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Movement manager instance\n\t*/\n\tgetMovementManager() {\n\t\tif (!this.movementManager) this.movementManager = MovementManager$1.forEngine(this);\n\t\treturn this.movementManager;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the zone manager bound to this engine.\n\t*\n\t* The manager is lazily created and reused. Zones allow detecting entities\n\t* within circular or cone-shaped areas without physical collisions (useful\n\t* for vision, skill ranges, explosions, etc.).\n\t*\n\t* **Important:** Call `zoneManager.update()` after each physics step to\n\t* keep zones synchronized:\n\t*\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* engine.step();\n\t* engine.getZoneManager().update();\n\t* ```\n\t*\n\t* @returns Zone manager instance\n\t*\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const zones = engine.getZoneManager();\n\t* const visionZone = zones.createAttachedZone(player, {\n\t*   radius: 100,\n\t*   angle: 90,\n\t*   direction: 'right',\n\t* }, {\n\t*   onEnter: (entities) => console.log('Player sees:', entities),\n\t* });\n\t*\n\t* engine.step();\n\t* zones.update();\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetZoneManager() {\n\t\tif (!this.zoneManager) this.zoneManager = new ZoneManager(this);\n\t\treturn this.zoneManager;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates all registered movement strategies.\n\t*\n\t* @param dt - Time delta in seconds (defaults to the world's time step)\n\t*/\n\tupdateMovements(dt) {\n\t\tconst manager = this.getMovementManager();\n\t\tconst delta = dt ?? this.world.getTimeStep();\n\t\tmanager.update(delta);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Updates movements and then steps the simulation.\n\t*\n\t* @param dt - Time delta in seconds (defaults to the world's time step)\n\t*/\n\tstepWithMovements(dt) {\n\t\tthis.updateMovements(dt);\n\t\tthis.step();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Advances the simulation by exactly one fixed tick.\n\t*\n\t* This helper is equivalent to {@link step} but returns the tick index after the step,\n\t* making it convenient for client-side prediction loops.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Current tick index after stepping\n\t*/\n\tstepOneTick() {\n\t\tthis.step();\n\t\treturn this.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Advances the simulation by a fixed number of ticks.\n\t*\n\t* @param ticks - Number of ticks to simulate (>= 1)\n\t* @returns Current tick index after stepping\n\t*/\n\tstepTicks(ticks) {\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(ticks) || ticks <= 0) return this.tick;\n\t\tconst total = Math.floor(ticks);\n\t\tfor (let i = 0; i < total; i += 1) this.step();\n\t\treturn this.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a new entity\n\t* \n\t* @param config - Entity configuration\n\t* @returns Created entity\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const entity = engine.createEntity({\n\t*   position: { x: 100, y: 100 },\n\t*   radius: 15,\n\t*   mass: 1,\n\t*   velocity: { x: 5, y: 0 }\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tcreateEntity(config) {\n\t\tconst entity = new Entity(config);\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.addEntity(entity);\n\t\telse this.world.addEntity(entity);\n\t\treturn entity;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Adds an existing entity to the engine\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to add\n\t* @returns The added entity\n\t*/\n\taddEntity(entity) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.addEntity(entity);\n\t\telse this.world.addEntity(entity);\n\t\treturn entity;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Removes an entity from the engine\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to remove\n\t*/\n\tremoveEntity(entity) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.removeEntity(entity);\n\t\telse this.world.removeEntity(entity);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets all entities\n\t* \n\t* @returns Array of all entities\n\t*/\n\tgetEntities() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tconst entities = [];\n\t\t\tfor (const region of this.regionManager.getRegions()) entities.push(...region.getEntities());\n\t\t\treturn entities;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn this.world.getEntities();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets an entity by UUID\n\t* \n\t* @param uuid - Entity UUID\n\t* @returns Entity or undefined\n\t*/\n\tgetEntityByUUID(uuid) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tfor (const region of this.regionManager.getRegions()) {\n\t\t\t\tconst entity = region.getWorld().getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t\t\t\tif (entity) return entity;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn this.world.getEntityByUUID(uuid);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Steps the physics simulation forward\n\t* \n\t* Updates all entities, detects and resolves collisions.\n\t*/\n\tstep() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.step();\n\t\telse this.world.step();\n\t\tthis.tick += 1;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the event system\n\t* \n\t* @returns Event system instance\n\t*/\n\tgetEvents() {\n\t\treturn this.world.getEvents();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Applies a force to an entity\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to apply force to\n\t* @param force - Force vector\n\t*/\n\tapplyForce(entity, force) {\n\t\tentity.applyForce(force);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Applies an impulse to an entity\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to apply impulse to\n\t* @param impulse - Impulse vector\n\t*/\n\tapplyImpulse(entity, impulse) {\n\t\tentity.applyImpulse(impulse);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Teleports an entity to a new position\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to teleport\n\t* @param position - New position\n\t*/\n\tteleport(entity, position) {\n\t\tentity.teleport(position);\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.updateEntities();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Freezes an entity (makes it static)\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to freeze\n\t*/\n\tfreeze(entity) {\n\t\tentity.freeze();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Unfreezes an entity (makes it dynamic)\n\t* \n\t* @param entity - Entity to unfreeze\n\t*/\n\tunfreeze(entity) {\n\t\tentity.unfreeze();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Queries entities in an AABB region\n\t* \n\t* @param bounds - AABB to query\n\t* @returns Array of entities in the region\n\t*/\n\tqueryAABB(bounds) {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tconst entities = [];\n\t\t\tconst regions = this.regionManager.getRegionsInBounds(bounds);\n\t\t\tfor (const region of regions) {\n\t\t\t\tconst worldEntities = region.getWorld().getEntities();\n\t\t\t\tfor (const entity of worldEntities) if (bounds.contains(entity.position)) entities.push(entity);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\treturn entities;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst world = this.world;\n\t\tif (world.spatialPartition) return Array.from(world.spatialPartition.queryAABB(bounds));\n\t\treturn this.world.getEntities().filter((e) => bounds.contains(e.position));\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Clears all entities from the engine\n\t*/\n\tclear() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) this.regionManager.clear();\n\t\telse this.world.clear();\n\t\tthis.tick = 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Assigns a polygon collider to an entity (supports convex or concave via convex parts).\n\t*\n\t* Design: the collider is attached via a registry and used by the detector on demand.\n\t* This keeps entities lightweight and preserves the separation of detection/resolution.\n\t*\n\t* @param entity - Target entity\n\t* @param config - Polygon configuration\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* engine.assignPolygonCollider(entity, { vertices: [new Vector2(-1,-1), new Vector2(1,-1), new Vector2(1,1), new Vector2(-1,1)], isConvex: true });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tassignPolygonCollider(entity, config) {\n\t\tassignPolygonCollider(entity, config);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Casts a ray in the physics world and returns the nearest hit, if any.\n\t* Uses the world's spatial partition for broad-phase and shape-specific narrow-phase tests.\n\t*\n\t* @param origin - Ray origin\n\t* @param direction - Ray direction (any length)\n\t* @param maxDistance - Maximum cast length\n\t* @param mask - Optional collision mask (layer)\n\t* @param filter - Optional filter function (return true to include entity)\n\t* @returns Raycast hit or null\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const hit = engine.raycast(new Vector2(0,0), new Vector2(1,0), 1000);\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\traycast(origin, direction, maxDistance, mask, filter) {\n\t\tconst partition = this.world.spatialPartition;\n\t\tif (!partition) return null;\n\t\treturn raycast(partition, origin, direction, maxDistance, mask, filter);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Computes continuous collision detection (sweep test) time-of-impact between two entities\n\t* over the next step of duration `dt`, using relative motion.\n\t*\n\t* @param a - First entity\n\t* @param b - Second entity\n\t* @param dt - Time step duration\n\t* @returns Sweep result or null if no hit in [0,1]\n\t* @example\n\t* ```typescript\n\t* const toi = engine.sweep(entityA, entityB, 1/60);\n\t* if (toi) {\n\t*   // pre-resolve or clamp motion\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tsweep(a, b, dt) {\n\t\treturn sweepEntities(a, b, a.velocity.sub(b.velocity).mul(dt));\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets statistics about the engine\n\t* \n\t* @returns Statistics object\n\t*/\n\tgetStats() {\n\t\tif (this.useRegions && this.regionManager) {\n\t\t\tconst regionStats = this.regionManager.getStats();\n\t\t\treturn {\n\t\t\t\t...this.world.getStats(),\n\t\t\t\tregions: {\n\t\t\t\t\ttotal: regionStats.totalRegions,\n\t\t\t\t\tactive: regionStats.activeRegions\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn this.world.getStats();\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the underlying world instance\n\t* \n\t* @returns World instance\n\t*/\n\tgetWorld() {\n\t\treturn this.world;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the current simulation tick.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Tick counter (starts at 0 and increments after each {@link step})\n\t*/\n\tgetTick() {\n\t\treturn this.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Captures a lightweight snapshot of the current world state.\n\t*\n\t* The snapshot only stores the minimum data required for client-side prediction:\n\t* position, velocity, rotation, angular velocity and sleeping flag per entity.\n\t*\n\t* @returns Snapshot object\n\t*/\n\ttakeSnapshot() {\n\t\treturn {\n\t\t\ttick: this.tick,\n\t\t\tentities: this.getEntities().map((entity) => ({\n\t\t\t\tuuid: entity.uuid,\n\t\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: entity.position.x,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: entity.position.y\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tvelocity: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: entity.velocity.x,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: entity.velocity.y\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\trotation: entity.rotation,\n\t\t\t\tangularVelocity: entity.angularVelocity,\n\t\t\t\tsleeping: entity.isSleeping()\n\t\t\t}))\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Restores a snapshot previously produced by {@link takeSnapshot}.\n\t*\n\t* Entities that cannot be found in the current engine are skipped silently.\n\t*\n\t* @param snapshot - Snapshot to restore\n\t*/\n\trestoreSnapshot(snapshot) {\n\t\tconst entities = new Map(this.getEntities().map((entity) => [entity.uuid, entity]));\n\t\tfor (const state of snapshot.entities) {\n\t\t\tconst entity = entities.get(state.uuid);\n\t\t\tif (!entity) continue;\n\t\t\tentity.position.set(state.position.x, state.position.y);\n\t\t\tentity.velocity.set(state.velocity.x, state.velocity.y);\n\t\t\tentity.rotation = state.rotation;\n\t\t\tentity.angularVelocity = state.angularVelocity;\n\t\t\tif (state.sleeping) entity.sleep();\n\t\t\telse entity.wakeUp();\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.tick = snapshot.tick;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Gets the region manager (if regions are enabled)\n\t* \n\t* @returns Region manager or null\n\t*/\n\tgetRegionManager() {\n\t\treturn this.regionManager;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/Dash.ts\n/**\n* Applies a burst of velocity during a fixed duration.\n*\n* The dash sets a constant velocity along a direction, then stops the entity\n* once the duration has elapsed.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(player, new Dash(8, { x: 1, y: 0 }, 0.15));\n* ```\n*/\nvar Dash = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a dash movement.\n\t*\n\t* @param speed - Movement speed in units per second\n\t* @param direction - Direction vector (will be normalized)\n\t* @param duration - Duration in seconds\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(speed, direction, duration) {\n\t\tthis.speed = speed;\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.finished = false;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.finished) return;\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.elapsed <= this.duration) body.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: this.direction.x * this.speed,\n\t\t\ty: this.direction.y * this.speed\n\t\t});\n\t\telse {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.finished;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/IceMovement.ts\n/**\n* Simulates slippery movement with gradual acceleration and deceleration.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const ice = new IceMovement({ x: 1, y: 0 }, 3, 0.25, 0.1);\n* movementManager.add(player, ice);\n* ```\n*/\nvar IceMovement = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates an ice-like movement behaviour.\n\t*\n\t* @param direction - Initial desired direction (normalized automatically)\n\t* @param maxSpeed - Maximum speed in units per second\n\t* @param acceleration - Fraction of the gap closed per second (0-1)\n\t* @param friction - Fraction of velocity retained per second when stopping (0-1)\n\t* @param duration - Optional duration in seconds\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(direction, maxSpeed = 4, acceleration = .2, friction = .08, duration) {\n\t\tthis.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tthis.acceleration = acceleration;\n\t\tthis.friction = friction;\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.currentVelocity = {\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.stopped = false;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.targetDirection = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.duration !== void 0) {\n\t\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\t\tif (this.elapsed >= this.duration) this.stopped = true;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (!this.stopped) {\n\t\t\tconst accelFactor = this.perSecondFactor(this.acceleration, dt);\n\t\t\tconst targetVx = this.targetDirection.x * this.maxSpeed;\n\t\t\tconst targetVy = this.targetDirection.y * this.maxSpeed;\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.x += (targetVx - this.currentVelocity.x) * accelFactor;\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.y += (targetVy - this.currentVelocity.y) * accelFactor;\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tconst frictionFactor = this.perSecondFactor(this.friction, dt);\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.x *= 1 - frictionFactor;\n\t\t\tthis.currentVelocity.y *= 1 - frictionFactor;\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: this.currentVelocity.x,\n\t\t\ty: this.currentVelocity.y\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\tif (!this.stopped) return false;\n\t\treturn Math.hypot(this.currentVelocity.x, this.currentVelocity.y) < .05;\n\t}\n\tstop() {\n\t\tthis.stopped = true;\n\t}\n\tresume() {\n\t\tthis.stopped = false;\n\t}\n\tsetTargetDirection(direction) {\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.targetDirection.x = magnitude > 0 ? direction.x / magnitude : 0;\n\t\tthis.targetDirection.y = magnitude > 0 ? direction.y / magnitude : 0;\n\t\tthis.stopped = false;\n\t}\n\tsetParameters(maxSpeed, acceleration, friction) {\n\t\tif (maxSpeed !== void 0) this.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tif (acceleration !== void 0) this.acceleration = acceleration;\n\t\tif (friction !== void 0) this.friction = friction;\n\t}\n\tperSecondFactor(value, dt) {\n\t\tconst clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value));\n\t\tif (dt <= 0) return clamped;\n\t\treturn 1 - Math.pow(1 - clamped, dt);\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/Knockback.ts\n/**\n* Simulates an impulse that pushes an entity away and gradually decays.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(enemy, new Knockback({ x: -1, y: 0 }, 12, 0.25, 0.4));\n* ```\n*/\nvar Knockback = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a knockback movement.\n\t*\n\t* @param direction - Direction of the impulse (will be normalized)\n\t* @param initialSpeed - Initial speed in units per second\n\t* @param duration - Duration in seconds\n\t* @param decayFactor - Fraction of speed preserved per second (0-1)\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(direction, initialSpeed, duration, decayFactor = .35) {\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.decayFactor = decayFactor;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.currentSpeed = initialSpeed;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.elapsed <= this.duration) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: this.direction.x * this.currentSpeed,\n\t\t\t\ty: this.direction.y * this.currentSpeed\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tconst decay = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, this.decayFactor));\n\t\t\tif (decay === 0) this.currentSpeed = 0;\n\t\t\telse if (decay === 1) {} else this.currentSpeed *= Math.pow(decay, dt);\n\t\t} else body.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.elapsed >= this.duration;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/LinearRepulsion.ts\n/**\n* Seeks a target while repelling from nearby obstacles using a linear falloff.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const strategy = new LinearRepulsion(\n*   engine,\n*   () => player.position.clone(),\n*   3,\n*   2,\n*   5,\n* );\n* movementManager.add(enemy, strategy);\n* ```\n*/\nvar LinearRepulsion = class {\n\t/**\n\t* @param engine - Physics engine used for spatial queries\n\t* @param targetProvider - Function returning the target position\n\t* @param maxSpeed - Maximum speed in units per second\n\t* @param repulseRadius - Radius used to sample nearby obstacles\n\t* @param repulseWeight - Weight of the repulsion force\n\t* @param ignoredEntity - Optional entity to exclude from avoidance (e.g. the target)\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(engine, targetProvider, maxSpeed = 2.5, repulseRadius = 2, repulseWeight = 4, ignoredEntity) {\n\t\tthis.engine = engine;\n\t\tthis.targetProvider = targetProvider;\n\t\tthis.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\tthis.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t\tthis.ignoredEntity = ignoredEntity;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, _dt) {\n\t\tconst entity = body.getEntity?.();\n\t\tif (!entity) throw new Error(\"LinearRepulsion requires a movement body backed by a physics entity.\");\n\t\tconst targetPosition = this.targetProvider();\n\t\tconst toTarget = new Vector2(targetPosition.x - entity.position.x, targetPosition.y - entity.position.y);\n\t\tconst distance = toTarget.length();\n\t\tif (distance > 0) toTarget.divInPlace(distance);\n\t\telse toTarget.set(0, 0);\n\t\tconst bounds = AABB.fromCenterSize(entity.position.x, entity.position.y, this.repulseRadius * 2, this.repulseRadius * 2);\n\t\tconst neighbors = this.engine.queryAABB(bounds);\n\t\tconst ignored = this.ignoredEntity?.();\n\t\tconst push = new Vector2(0, 0);\n\t\tfor (const other of neighbors) {\n\t\t\tif (other === entity || other === ignored || other.isStatic()) continue;\n\t\t\tconst diff = new Vector2(entity.position.x - other.position.x, entity.position.y - other.position.y);\n\t\t\tconst d2 = diff.lengthSquared();\n\t\t\tif (d2 > this.repulseRadiusSq || d2 === 0) continue;\n\t\t\tconst d = Math.sqrt(d2);\n\t\t\tconst weight = this.repulseWeight * (this.repulseRadius - Math.min(d, this.repulseRadius)) / this.repulseRadius;\n\t\t\tpush.addInPlace(diff.mul(weight / d));\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst maxPush = this.maxSpeed * 3;\n\t\tconst pushLength = push.length();\n\t\tif (pushLength > maxPush && pushLength > 0) push.mulInPlace(maxPush / pushLength);\n\t\tconst desired = toTarget.mul(this.maxSpeed).add(push);\n\t\tconst desiredLength = desired.length();\n\t\tif (desiredLength > this.maxSpeed && desiredLength > 0) desired.mulInPlace(this.maxSpeed / desiredLength);\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(desired.x) || !Number.isFinite(desired.y)) {\n\t\t\tentity.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity(desired);\n\t}\n\tsetParameters(maxSpeed, repulseRadius, repulseWeight) {\n\t\tif (maxSpeed !== void 0) this.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tif (repulseRadius !== void 0) {\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (repulseWeight !== void 0) this.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/Oscillate.ts\n/**\n* Oscillates an entity around its initial position using different wave patterns.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(platform, new Oscillate({ x: 1, y: 0 }, 2, 3, 'sine'));\n* ```\n*/\nvar Oscillate = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates an oscillating movement.\n\t*\n\t* @param direction - Base direction (will be normalized)\n\t* @param amplitude - Maximum displacement from the anchor position\n\t* @param period - Duration of a full cycle in seconds\n\t* @param type - Oscillation pattern\n\t* @param duration - Total life time in seconds (undefined for infinite)\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(direction, amplitude, period, type = \"sine\", duration) {\n\t\tthis.amplitude = amplitude;\n\t\tthis.period = period;\n\t\tthis.type = type;\n\t\tthis.duration = duration;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.anchor = null;\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(direction.x, direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.anchor === null) this.anchor = {\n\t\t\tx: body.position.x,\n\t\t\ty: body.position.y\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.duration !== void 0 && this.elapsed >= this.duration) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst cycle = this.period <= 0 ? 0 : this.elapsed % this.period / this.period;\n\t\tconst frequency = this.period > 0 ? 2 * Math.PI / this.period : 0;\n\t\tlet velocityScale;\n\t\tswitch (this.type) {\n\t\t\tcase \"sine\":\n\t\t\t\tvelocityScale = Math.cos(cycle * Math.PI * 2) * frequency * this.amplitude;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase \"circular\":\n\t\t\t\tvelocityScale = Math.cos(cycle * Math.PI * 2) * frequency * this.amplitude;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase \"linear\":\n\t\t\t\tvelocityScale = (cycle < .5 ? 1 : -1) * (2 * this.amplitude) / (this.period / 2);\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tdefault: velocityScale = 0;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst vx = this.direction.x * velocityScale;\n\t\tconst vy = this.direction.y * velocityScale;\n\t\tif (this.type === \"circular\") {\n\t\t\tconst perpendicularScale = -Math.sin(cycle * Math.PI * 2) * frequency * this.amplitude;\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: vx - this.direction.y * perpendicularScale,\n\t\t\t\ty: vy + this.direction.x * perpendicularScale\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t} else body.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: vx,\n\t\t\ty: vy\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.duration !== void 0 && this.elapsed >= this.duration;\n\t}\n\treset() {\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.anchor = null;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/PathFollow.ts\n/**\n* Makes an entity follow a list of waypoints at a constant speed.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* movementManager.add(npc, new PathFollow(\n*   [{ x: 0, y: 0 }, { x: 4, y: 0 }, { x: 4, y: 4 }],\n*   1.5,\n*   true,\n*   0.5,\n* ));\n* ```\n*/\nvar PathFollow = class {\n\t/**\n\t* Creates a path-following strategy.\n\t*\n\t* @param waypoints - List of waypoints to traverse\n\t* @param speed - Travel speed in units per second\n\t* @param loop - When true, restart from the first waypoint\n\t* @param pauseAtWaypoints - Optional pause duration (seconds) at each waypoint\n\t* @param tolerance - Distance tolerance to consider a waypoint reached\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(waypoints, speed, loop = false, pauseAtWaypoints = 0, tolerance = .1) {\n\t\tthis.waypoints = waypoints;\n\t\tthis.speed = speed;\n\t\tthis.loop = loop;\n\t\tthis.pauseAtWaypoints = pauseAtWaypoints;\n\t\tthis.tolerance = tolerance;\n\t\tthis.currentWaypoint = 0;\n\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\tthis.paused = false;\n\t\tthis.finished = false;\n\t\tthis.direction = {\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tif (waypoints.length === 0) this.finished = true;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.finished || this.waypoints.length === 0) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.paused) {\n\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause += dt;\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tif (this.elapsedPause >= this.pauseAtWaypoints) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.paused = false;\n\t\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\t\t} else return;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst target = this.waypoints[this.currentWaypoint];\n\t\tif (!target) {\n\t\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst dx = target.x - body.position.x;\n\t\tconst dy = target.y - body.position.y;\n\t\tconst distance = Math.hypot(dx, dy);\n\t\tif (distance <= this.tolerance) {\n\t\t\tthis.currentWaypoint += 1;\n\t\t\tif (this.currentWaypoint >= this.waypoints.length) if (this.loop) this.currentWaypoint = 0;\n\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (this.pauseAtWaypoints > 0) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.paused = true;\n\t\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (distance > 0) this.direction = {\n\t\t\tx: dx / distance,\n\t\t\ty: dy / distance\n\t\t};\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: this.direction.x * this.speed,\n\t\t\ty: this.direction.y * this.speed\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.finished;\n\t}\n\tgetCurrentWaypoint() {\n\t\treturn this.currentWaypoint;\n\t}\n\tsetWaypoints(waypoints, reset = true) {\n\t\tthis.waypoints = waypoints;\n\t\tthis.finished = waypoints.length === 0;\n\t\tif (reset) {\n\t\t\tthis.currentWaypoint = 0;\n\t\t\tthis.paused = false;\n\t\t\tthis.elapsedPause = 0;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/ProjectileMovement.ts\n/**\n* Type of projectile trajectory.\n*/\nvar ProjectileType = /* @__PURE__ */ function(ProjectileType) {\n\tProjectileType[\"Straight\"] = \"straight\";\n\tProjectileType[\"Arc\"] = \"arc\";\n\tProjectileType[\"Bounce\"] = \"bounce\";\n\treturn ProjectileType;\n}({});\nvar ProjectileStage = /* @__PURE__ */ function(ProjectileStage) {\n\tProjectileStage[ProjectileStage[\"Flying\"] = 0] = \"Flying\";\n\tProjectileStage[ProjectileStage[\"Rolling\"] = 1] = \"Rolling\";\n\tProjectileStage[ProjectileStage[\"Finished\"] = 2] = \"Finished\";\n\treturn ProjectileStage;\n}(ProjectileStage || {});\n/**\n* Moves an entity following a projectile trajectory.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const projectile = new ProjectileMovement(ProjectileType.Arc, {\n*   speed: 12,\n*   direction: { x: 1, y: 0 },\n*   maxHeight: 3,\n*   gravity: 30,\n* });\n* movementManager.add(entity, projectile);\n* ```\n*/\nvar ProjectileMovement = class {\n\tconstructor(type, options) {\n\t\tthis.type = type;\n\t\tthis.elapsed = 0;\n\t\tthis.distanceTraveled = 0;\n\t\tthis.startPosition = null;\n\t\tthis.bounceCount = 0;\n\t\tthis.stage = ProjectileStage.Flying;\n\t\tthis.finished = false;\n\t\tthis.currentHeight = 0;\n\t\tthis.verticalVelocity = 0;\n\t\tthis.options = {\n\t\t\tspeed: options.speed,\n\t\t\tdirection: options.direction,\n\t\t\tinitialHeight: 0,\n\t\t\tmaxHeight: 2,\n\t\t\tgravity: 30,\n\t\t\tmaxBounces: 0,\n\t\t\tbounciness: .6,\n\t\t\tdrag: 0,\n\t\t\t...options\n\t\t};\n\t\tconst magnitude = Math.hypot(this.options.direction.x, this.options.direction.y);\n\t\tthis.direction = magnitude > 0 ? {\n\t\t\tx: this.options.direction.x / magnitude,\n\t\t\ty: this.options.direction.y / magnitude\n\t\t} : {\n\t\t\tx: 1,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t};\n\t\tthis.currentHeight = this.options.initialHeight ?? 0;\n\t\tif (this.type === ProjectileType.Arc || this.type === ProjectileType.Bounce) {\n\t\t\tconst gravity = this.options.gravity ?? 30;\n\t\t\tconst maxHeight = this.options.maxHeight ?? 2;\n\t\t\tthis.verticalVelocity = Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, 2 * gravity * maxHeight));\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, dt) {\n\t\tif (this.finished || dt <= 0) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.startPosition === null) this.startPosition = new Vector2(body.position.x, body.position.y);\n\t\tthis.elapsed += dt;\n\t\tif (this.options.lifetime !== void 0 && this.elapsed >= this.options.lifetime) {\n\t\t\tthis.finish(body);\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tswitch (this.stage) {\n\t\t\tcase ProjectileStage.Flying:\n\t\t\t\tthis.updateFlying(body, dt);\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase ProjectileStage.Rolling:\n\t\t\t\tthis.updateRolling(body, dt);\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase ProjectileStage.Finished:\n\t\t\t\tthis.finish(body);\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.startPosition) {\n\t\t\tthis.distanceTraveled = new Vector2(body.position.x, body.position.y).distanceTo(this.startPosition);\n\t\t\tif (this.options.maxRange !== void 0 && this.distanceTraveled >= this.options.maxRange) this.finish(body);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tisFinished() {\n\t\treturn this.finished;\n\t}\n\tgetHeight() {\n\t\treturn this.currentHeight;\n\t}\n\tgetProgress() {\n\t\tif (this.options.maxRange) return Math.min(1, this.distanceTraveled / this.options.maxRange);\n\t\tif (this.options.lifetime) return Math.min(1, this.elapsed / this.options.lifetime);\n\t\treturn 0;\n\t}\n\tupdateFlying(body, dt) {\n\t\tlet vx = this.direction.x * this.options.speed;\n\t\tlet vy = this.direction.y * this.options.speed;\n\t\tconst drag = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, this.options.drag ?? 0));\n\t\tif (drag > 0) {\n\t\t\tconst dragFactor = Math.pow(1 - drag, dt);\n\t\t\tvx *= dragFactor;\n\t\t\tvy *= dragFactor;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (this.type === ProjectileType.Arc || this.type === ProjectileType.Bounce) {\n\t\t\tconst gravity = this.options.gravity ?? 30;\n\t\t\tthis.verticalVelocity -= gravity * dt;\n\t\t\tthis.currentHeight += this.verticalVelocity * dt;\n\t\t\tif (this.options.onHeightUpdate) this.options.onHeightUpdate(this.currentHeight, body);\n\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\tconst dispatcher = globalThis;\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof dispatcher.dispatchEvent === \"function\" && typeof CustomEvent !== \"undefined\") {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst event = new CustomEvent(\"projectile:height\", { detail: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tid: body.id,\n\t\t\t\t\t\theight: this.currentHeight\n\t\t\t\t\t} });\n\t\t\t\t\tdispatcher.dispatchEvent(event);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (this.currentHeight <= 0) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.currentHeight = 0;\n\t\t\t\tif (this.type === ProjectileType.Bounce) if (this.bounceCount < (this.options.maxBounces ?? 0)) {\n\t\t\t\t\tconst bounceEnergy = this.options.bounciness ?? .6;\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.verticalVelocity = Math.abs(this.verticalVelocity) * bounceEnergy;\n\t\t\t\t\tvx *= bounceEnergy;\n\t\t\t\t\tvy *= bounceEnergy;\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.bounceCount += 1;\n\t\t\t\t} else this.stage = ProjectileStage.Rolling;\n\t\t\t\telse {\n\t\t\t\t\tthis.finish(body);\n\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: vx,\n\t\t\ty: vy\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\tupdateRolling(body, dt) {\n\t\tconst friction = .85;\n\t\tconst vx = body.velocity.x * Math.pow(friction, dt * 60);\n\t\tconst vy = body.velocity.y * Math.pow(friction, dt * 60);\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: vx,\n\t\t\ty: vy\n\t\t});\n\t\tif (Math.abs(vx) < .1 && Math.abs(vy) < .1) this.finish(body);\n\t}\n\tfinish(body) {\n\t\tthis.finished = true;\n\t\tthis.stage = ProjectileStage.Finished;\n\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t});\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../physic/src/movement/strategies/SeekAvoid.ts\nvar EPSILON = .001;\n/**\n* Seeks a moving target while avoiding nearby obstacles.\n*\n* The strategy combines a pull towards the target with repulsive forces from\n* close entities, creating smooth avoidance behaviour.\n*\n* @example\n* ```typescript\n* const seek = new SeekAvoid(engine, () => playerEntity, 3, 2, 6, 0.5);\n* movementManager.add(enemy, seek);\n* ```\n*/\nvar SeekAvoid = class {\n\t/**\n\t* @param engine - Physics engine used for spatial queries\n\t* @param targetProvider - Function returning the target entity (or null)\n\t* @param maxSpeed - Maximum speed in units per second\n\t* @param repulseRadius - Radius in which obstacles apply repulsion\n\t* @param repulseWeight - Strength of the repulsion force\n\t* @param arriveRadius - Distance considered as arrival\n\t*/\n\tconstructor(engine, targetProvider, maxSpeed = 2.5, repulseRadius = 2, repulseWeight = 4, arriveRadius = .5) {\n\t\tthis.engine = engine;\n\t\tthis.targetProvider = targetProvider;\n\t\tthis.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\tthis.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t\tthis.arriveRadiusSq = arriveRadius * arriveRadius;\n\t}\n\tupdate(body, _dt) {\n\t\tconst entity = body.getEntity?.();\n\t\tif (!entity) throw new Error(\"SeekAvoid requires a movement body backed by a physics entity.\");\n\t\tconst target = this.targetProvider();\n\t\tif (!target) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst toTarget = new Vector2(target.position.x - entity.position.x, target.position.y - entity.position.y);\n\t\tconst distSq = toTarget.lengthSquared();\n\t\tlet arrived = false;\n\t\tif (distSq <= this.arriveRadiusSq) {\n\t\t\ttoTarget.set(0, 0);\n\t\t\tarrived = true;\n\t\t} else if (distSq > 0) toTarget.divInPlace(Math.sqrt(distSq));\n\t\tconst bounds = AABB.fromCenterSize(entity.position.x, entity.position.y, this.repulseRadius * 2, this.repulseRadius * 2);\n\t\tconst neighbors = this.engine.queryAABB(bounds);\n\t\tconst push = new Vector2(0, 0);\n\t\tlet neighborCount = 0;\n\t\tif (!arrived) for (const other of neighbors) {\n\t\t\tif (other === entity || other === target || other.isStatic()) continue;\n\t\t\tconst diff = new Vector2(entity.position.x - other.position.x, entity.position.y - other.position.y);\n\t\t\tlet d2 = diff.lengthSquared();\n\t\t\tif (d2 > this.repulseRadiusSq) continue;\n\t\t\tneighborCount++;\n\t\t\tif (d2 < EPSILON) d2 = EPSILON;\n\t\t\tconst weight = this.repulseWeight / d2;\n\t\t\tpush.addInPlace(diff.mul(weight));\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst pushLength = push.length();\n\t\tconst maxPush = this.maxSpeed * .5;\n\t\tif (pushLength > maxPush && pushLength > 0) push.mulInPlace(maxPush / pushLength);\n\t\tconst desired = toTarget.mul(this.maxSpeed).add(push);\n\t\tconst desiredLength = desired.length();\n\t\tconst maxCombinedSpeed = this.maxSpeed * 1.5;\n\t\tif (desiredLength > maxCombinedSpeed && desiredLength > 0) desired.mulInPlace(maxCombinedSpeed / desiredLength);\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(desired.x) || !Number.isFinite(desired.y)) {\n\t\t\tbody.setVelocity({\n\t\t\t\tx: 0,\n\t\t\t\ty: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tbody.setVelocity(desired);\n\t}\n\tsetParameters(maxSpeed, repulseRadius, repulseWeight, arriveRadius) {\n\t\tif (maxSpeed !== void 0) this.maxSpeed = maxSpeed;\n\t\tif (repulseRadius !== void 0) {\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadius = repulseRadius;\n\t\t\tthis.repulseRadiusSq = repulseRadius * repulseRadius;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (repulseWeight !== void 0) this.repulseWeight = repulseWeight;\n\t\tif (arriveRadius !== void 0) this.arriveRadiusSq = arriveRadius * arriveRadius;\n\t}\n};\n//#endregion\n//#region ../common/src/movement/MovementManager.ts\n/**\n* Thin proxy around the physics movement manager.\n*\n* Delegates every operation to the deterministic {\n\t\tconst currentX = player.x();\n\t\tconst currentY = player.y();\n\t\tconst speed = player.speed();\n\t\tlet nextX = currentX;\n\t\tlet nextY = currentY;\n\t\tswitch (direction) {\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Left:\n\t\t\t\tnextX = currentX - speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Right:\n\t\t\t\tnextX = currentX + speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Up:\n\t\t\t\tnextY = currentY - speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\tcase Direction.Down:\n\t\t\t\tnextY = currentY + speed;\n\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t}\n\t\tplayer.changeDirection(direction);\n\t\tif (typeof player.autoChangeMap === \"function\" && !player.isEvent()) {\n\t\t\tif (await player.autoChangeMap({\n\t\t\t\tx: nextX,\n\t\t\t\ty: nextY\n\t\t\t}, direction)) {\n\t\t\t\tthis.stopMovement(player);\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tthis.moveBody(player, direction);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Check if an entity is currently moving\n\t* \n\t* @param id - ID of the entity to check\n\t* @returns Boolean indicating if the entity is in motion\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Check if player is moving\n\t* if (map.isMoving('player1')) {\n\t*   // Player is in motion\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tisMoving(id) {\n\t\treturn this.isEntityMoving(id);\n\t}\n\tgetObjectById(id) {\n\t\treturn this.players()[id] ?? this.events()[id];\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Execute physics simulation with fixed timestep\n\t* \n\t* This method runs the physics engine using a fixed timestep accumulator pattern.\n\t* It ensures deterministic physics regardless of frame rate by:\n\t* 1. Accumulating delta time\n\t* 2. Running fixed-size physics steps until the accumulator is depleted\n\t* 3. Calling `updateMovements()` before each step to apply velocity changes\n\t* 4. Running post-tick updates (zones, callbacks) after each step\n\t* \n\t* ## Architecture\n\t* \n\t* The physics loop is centralized here and called from `tick$` subscription.\n\t* Input processing (`processInput`) only updates entity velocities - it does NOT\n\t* step the physics. This ensures:\n\t* - Consistent physics timing (60fps fixed timestep)\n\t* - No double-stepping when inputs are processed\n\t* - Proper accumulator-based interpolation support\n\t* \n\t* @param deltaMs - Time elapsed since last call in milliseconds\n\t* @param hooks - Optional callbacks for before/after each physics step\n\t* @returns Number of physics ticks executed\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Called automatically by tick$ subscription\n\t* this.tickSubscription = this.tick$.subscribe(({ delta }) => {\n\t*   this.runFixedTicks(delta);\n\t* });\n\t* \n\t* // Or manually with hooks for debugging\n\t* this.runFixedTicks(16, {\n\t*   beforeStep: () => console.log('Before physics step'),\n\t*   afterStep: (tick) => console.log(`Physics tick ${tick} completed`)\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\trunFixedTicks(deltaMs, hooks) {\n\t\tif (!Number.isFinite(deltaMs) || deltaMs <= 0) return 0;\n\t\tconst fixedStepMs = this.physic.getWorld().getTimeStep() * 1e3;\n\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs += deltaMs;\n\t\tlet executed = 0;\n\t\twhile (this.physicsAccumulatorMs >= fixedStepMs) {\n\t\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs -= fixedStepMs;\n\t\t\thooks?.beforeStep?.();\n\t\t\tthis.physic.updateMovements();\n\t\t\tconst tick = this.physic.stepOneTick();\n\t\t\texecuted += 1;\n\t\t\tthis.runPostTickUpdates();\n\t\t\thooks?.afterStep?.(tick);\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn executed;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Manually trigger a single game tick\n\t* \n\t* This method allows you to manually advance the game by one tick (16ms at 60fps).\n\t* It's primarily useful for testing where you need precise control over when\n\t* physics updates occur, rather than relying on the automatic tick$ subscription.\n\t* \n\t* ## Use Cases\n\t* \n\t* - **Testing**: Control exactly when physics steps occur in unit tests\n\t* - **Manual control**: Step through game state manually for debugging\n\t* - **Deterministic testing**: Ensure consistent timing in test scenarios\n\t* \n\t* ## Important\n\t* \n\t* This method should NOT be used in production code alongside the automatic `tick$`\n\t* subscription, as it will cause double-stepping. Use either:\n\t* - Automatic ticks (via `loadPhysic()` which subscribes to `tick$`)\n\t* - Manual ticks (via `nextTick()` without `loadPhysic()` subscription)\n\t* \n\t* @param deltaMs - Optional delta time in milliseconds (default: 16ms for 60fps)\n\t* @returns Number of physics ticks executed\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // In tests: manually advance game by one tick\n\t* map.nextTick(); // Advances by 16ms (one frame at 60fps)\n\t* \n\t* // With custom delta\n\t* map.nextTick(32); // Advances by 32ms (two frames at 60fps)\n\t* \n\t* // In a test loop\n\t* for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) {\n\t*   map.nextTick(); // Simulate 1 second of game time\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tnextTick(deltaMs = 16) {\n\t\treturn this.runFixedTicks(deltaMs);\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Force a single physics tick outside of the normal game loop\n\t* \n\t* This method is primarily used for **client-side prediction** where the client\n\t* needs to immediately simulate physics in response to local input, rather than\n\t* waiting for the next game loop tick.\n\t* \n\t* ## Use Cases\n\t* \n\t* - **Client-side prediction**: Immediately simulate player movement for responsive feel\n\t* - **Testing**: Force a physics step in unit tests\n\t* - **Special effects**: Immediate physics response for specific game events\n\t* \n\t* ## Important\n\t* \n\t* This method should NOT be used on the server for normal input processing.\n\t* Server-side physics is handled by `runFixedTicks` in the main game loop to ensure\n\t* deterministic simulation.\n\t* \n\t* @param hooks - Optional callbacks for before/after the physics step\n\t* @returns The physics tick number\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Client-side: immediately simulate predicted movement\n\t* class RpgClientMap extends RpgCommonMap {\n\t*   stepPredictionTick(): void {\n\t*     this.forceSingleTick();\n\t*   }\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tforceSingleTick(hooks) {\n\t\thooks?.beforeStep?.();\n\t\tthis.physic.updateMovements();\n\t\tconst tick = this.physic.stepOneTick();\n\t\tthis.runPostTickUpdates();\n\t\thooks?.afterStep?.(tick);\n\t\tconst fixedMs = this.physic.getWorld().getTimeStep() * 1e3;\n\t\tthis.physicsAccumulatorMs = Math.max(0, this.physicsAccumulatorMs - fixedMs);\n\t\treturn tick;\n\t}\n\tcreateCharacterHitbox(owner, kind, options) {\n\t\tif (!owner?.id) return;\n\t\tconst existingEntity = this.physic.getEntityByUUID(owner.id);\n\t\tif (existingEntity) {\n\t\t\texistingEntity.owner = owner;\n\t\t\tthis.bindCharacterSignalSync(existingEntity, owner);\n\t\t\tthis.updateCharacterHitbox(owner);\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tconst hitbox = typeof owner.hitbox === \"function\" ? owner.hitbox() : owner.hitbox;\n\t\tconst width = hitbox?.w ?? 32;\n\t\tconst height = hitbox?.h ?? 32;\n\t\tconst radius = Math.max(width, height) / 2;\n\t\tthis.addCharacter({\n\t\t\towner,\n\t\t\tradius,\n\t\t\tkind,\n\t\t\tmaxSpeed: owner.speed(),\n\t\t\tcollidesWithCharacters: !this.shouldDisableCharacterCollisions(owner),\n\t\t\tisStatic: this.physic.getEntityByUUID(owner.id);\n\t\tif (!entity) return;\n\t\tentity.owner = owner;\n\t\tthis.bindCharacterSignalSync(entity, owner);\n\t\tconst hitbox = typeof owner.hitbox === \"function\" ? !this.shouldDisableCharacterCollisions(owner));\n\t}\n\tresolveNumeric(source, fallback = 0) {\n\t\tif (typeof source === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\treturn Number(source()) ?? fallback;\n\t\t} catch {\n\t\t\treturn fallback;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (typeof source === \"number\") return source;\n\t\treturn fallback;\n\t}\n\tbindCharacterSignalSync(entity, owner) {\n\t\tconst entityAny = entity;\n\t\tif (entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner === owner && typeof entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe === \"function\") return;\n\t\tthis.unbindCharacterSignalSync(entity);\n\t\tentityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner = owner;\n\t\tconst subscriptions = [];\n\t\tentityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe = () => {\n\t\t\tsubscriptions.forEach((subscription) => subscription.unsubscribe());\n\t\t\tdelete entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe;\n\t\t\tdelete entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner;\n\t\t};\n\t\tconst syncFromSignals = () => {\n\t\t\tif (this.isPhysicsSyncingSignals) return;\n\t\t\tconst currentOwner = entityAny.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!currentOwner?.id || currentOwner.id !== entity.uuid) return;\n\t\t\tthis.updateCharacterHitbox(currentOwner);\n\t\t};\n\t\tconst subscribeSignal = (signalLike) => {\n\t\t\tconst observable = signalLike?.observable;\n\t\t\tif (!observable || typeof observable.subscribe !== \"function\") return;\n\t\t\tsubscriptions.push(observable.subscribe(() => syncFromSignals()));\n\t\t};\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner.x);\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner.y);\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner.hitbox);\n\t\tsubscribeSignal(owner._through);\n\t}\n\tunbindCharacterSignalSync(entity) {\n\t\tconst entityAny = entity;\n\t\tconst unsubscribe = entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncUnsubscribe;\n\t\tif (typeof unsubscribe === \"function\") {\n\t\t\tunsubscribe();\n\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t}\n\t\tdelete entityAny.__rpgSignalSyncOwner;\n\t}\n\tshouldDisableCharacterCollisions(owner) {\n\t\tif (typeof owner._through === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\treturn !!owner._through();\n\t\t} catch {\n\t\t\treturn false;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (typeof owner.through === \"boolean\") return owner.through;\n\t\treturn false;\n\t}\n\tresolvePhysicsEntityKind(owner, id) {\n\t\tif (typeof owner?.isEvent === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\tif (owner.isEvent()) return \"npc\";\n\t\t} catch {}\n\t\tconst ownerId = typeof owner?.id === \"string\" ? owner.id : id;\n\t\tif (ownerId && this.players()?.[ownerId]) return \"hero\";\n\t\tif (ownerId && this.events()?.[ownerId]) return \"npc\";\n\t\treturn \"generic\";\n\t}\n\temitPhysicsInit(_context) {}\n\temitPhysicsEntityAdd(_context) {}\n\temitPhysicsEntityRemove(_context) {}\n\temitPhysicsReset() {}\n\twithPhysicsSync(run) {\n\t\tthis.physicsSyncDepth += 1;\n\t\ttry {\n\t\t\treturn run();\n\t\t} finally {\n\t\t\tthis.physicsSyncDepth -= 1;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tget isPhysicsSyncingSignals() {\n\t\treturn this.physicsSyncDepth > 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get the world maps manager\n\t* \n\t* @returns WorldMapsManager instance or null if not configured\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const worldMaps = map.getWorldMapsManager();\n\t* if (worldMaps) {\n\t*   const adjacentMaps = worldMaps.getAdjacentMaps(currentMap, coordinates);\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetWorldMapsManager() {\n\t\treturn this.worldMapsManager ?? null;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Get attached World\n\t* \n\t* Recover undefined\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const world = map.getInWorldMaps();\n\t* if (world) {\n\t*   console.log(world.getAllMaps());\n\t* }\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tgetInWorldMaps() {\n\t\treturn this.worldMapsManager ?? void 0;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Remove this map from the world\n\t* \n\t* Remove this map from the world\n\t* \n\t* @since 3.0.0-beta.8\n\t* @returns {boolean | undefined} True if removed, false if not found, undefined if no world attached\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const removed = map.removeFromWorldMaps();\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tremoveFromWorldMaps() {\n\t\tif Assign the map to a world\n\t* \n\t* @since 3.0.0-beta.8\n\t* @param {RpgWorldMaps} worldMap world maps\n\t* @returns {void}\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* const world = new {\n\t\tthis.worldMapsManager = worldMap;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Create a temporary and moving hitbox on the map\n\t* \n\t* Allows to create a temporary hitbox that moves through multiple positions sequentially.\n\t* For example, you can use it to explode a bomb and find all the affected players, \n\t* or during a sword strike, you can create a moving hitbox and find the affected players.\n\t* \n\t* The method creates a zone sensor that moves through the specified hitbox positions\n\t* at the given speed, detecting collisions with players and events at each step.\n\t* \n\t* @param hitboxes - Array of hitbox positions to move through sequentially\n\t* @param options - Configuration options for the movement\n\t* @returns Observable that emits arrays of hit entities and completes when movement is finished\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Create a sword slash effect that moves through two positions\n\t* map.createMovingHitbox([\n\t*   { x: 100, y: 100, width: 50, height: 50 },\n\t*   { x: 120, y: 100, width: 50, height: 50 }\n\t* ], { speed: 2 }).subscribe({\n\t*   next(hits) {\n\t*     // hits contains RpgPlayer or RpgEvent objects that were hit\n\t*     console.log('Hit entities:', hits);\n\t*   },\n\t*   complete() {\n\t*     console.log('Movement finished');\n\t*   }\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t*/\n\tcreateMovingHitbox(hitboxes, options = {}) {\n\t\tconst { speed = 1 } = options;\n\t\tconst zoneId = `moving_hitbox_${generateShortUUID()}`;\n\t\treturn new Observable((observer) => {\n\t\t\tif (hitboxes.length === 0) {\n\t\t\t\tobserver.complete();\n\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlet currentIndex = 0;\n\t\t\tlet frameCounter = 0;\n\t\t\tconst hitEntities = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();\n\t\t\tconst firstHitbox = hitboxes[0];\n\t\t\tconst radius = Math.max(firstHitbox.width, firstHitbox.height) / 2;\n\t\t\tthis.addZone(zoneId, {\n\t\t\t\tx: firstHitbox.x + firstHitbox.width / 2,\n\t\t\t\ty: firstHitbox.y + firstHitbox.height / 2,\n\t\t\t\tradius\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tthis.registerZoneEvents(zoneId, (hitIds) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst hitObjects = hitIds.map((id) => this.getObjectById(id)).filter((obj) => obj !== void 0);\n\t\t\t\tif (hitObjects.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\thitIds.forEach((id) => hitEntities.add(id));\n\t\t\t\t\tobserver.next(hitObjects);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tconst tickSubscription = this.tick$.subscribe(() => {\n\t\t\t\tframeCounter++;\n\t\t\t\tif (frameCounter >= speed) {\n\t\t\t\t\tframeCounter = 0;\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrentIndex++;\n\t\t\t\t\tif (currentIndex >= hitboxes.length) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.removeZone(zoneId);\n\t\t\t\t\t\ttickSubscription.unsubscribe();\n\t\t\t\t\t\tobserver.complete();\n\t\t\t\t\t\treturn;\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tconst nextHitbox = hitboxes[currentIndex];\n\t\t\t\t\tif (this.getZone(zoneId)) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.removeZone(zoneId);\n\t\t\t\t\t\tconst newRadius = Math.max(nextHitbox.width, nextHitbox.height) / 2;\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.addZone(zoneId, {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tx: nextHitbox.x + nextHitbox.width / 2,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\ty: nextHitbox.y + nextHitbox.height / 2,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tradius: newRadius\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t\t\tthis.registerZoneEvents(zoneId, (hitIds) => {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tconst hitObjects = hitIds.map((id) => this.getObjectById(id)).filter((obj) => obj !== void 0);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif (hitObjects.length > 0) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\thitIds.forEach((id) => hitEntities.add(id));\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tobserver.next(hitObjects);\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t});\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\treturn () => {\n\t\t\t\ttickSubscription.unsubscribe();\n\t\t\t\tthis.removeZone(zoneId);\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t});\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Add a static hitbox to the physics world\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\taddStaticHitbox(id, xOrPoints, y, width, height) {\n\t\tif (this.physic.getEntityByUUID(id)) throw new Error(`Hitbox with id ${id} already exists`);\n\t\tlet entity;\n\t\tlet boxWidth;\n\t\tlet boxHeight;\n\t\tif (Array.isArray(xOrPoints)) {\n\t\t\tconst points = xOrPoints;\n\t\t\tif (points.length < 3) throw new Error(`Polygon must have at least 3 points, got ${points.length}`);\n\t\t\tlet minX = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tlet minY = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tlet maxX = Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tlet maxY = Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;\n\t\t\tfor (const point of points) {\n\t\t\t\tif (!Array.isArray(point) || point.length !== 2 || typeof point[0] !== \"number\" || typeof point[1] !== \"number\") throw new Error(`Invalid point ${JSON.stringify(point)}. Expected [x, y].`);\n\t\t\t\tminX = Math.min(minX, point[0]);\n\t\t\t\tmaxX = Math.max(maxX, point[0]);\n\t\t\t\tminY = Math.min(minY, point[1]);\n\t\t\t\tmaxY = Math.max(maxY, point[1]);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tconst centerX = (minX + maxX) / 2;\n\t\t\tconst centerY = (minY + maxY) / 2;\n\t\t\tboxWidth = Math.max(maxX - minX, 1);\n\t\t\tboxHeight = Math.max(maxY - minY, 1);\n\t\t\tentity = this.physic.createEntity({\n\t\t\t\tuuid: id,\n\t\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: centerX,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: centerY\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\twidth: boxWidth,\n\t\t\t\theight: boxHeight,\n\t\t\t\tmass: Infinity,\n\t\t\t\tstate: EntityState.Static,\n\t\t\t\trestitution: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tentity.freeze();\n\t\t\tconst localVertices = points.map((point) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst [px, py] = point;\n\t\t\t\treturn new Vector2(px - centerX, py - centerY);\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tassignPolygonCollider(entity, { vertices: localVertices });\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif (typeof y !== \"number\" || typeof width !== \"number\" || typeof height !== \"number\") throw new Error(\"Rectangle hitbox requires x, y, width and height parameters\");\n\t\t\tconst centerX = xOrPoints + width / 2;\n\t\t\tconst centerY = y + height / 2;\n\t\t\tboxWidth = Math.max(width, 1);\n\t\t\tboxHeight = Math.max(height, 1);\n\t\t\tentity = this.physic.createEntity({\n\t\t\t\tuuid: id,\n\t\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\t\tx: centerX,\n\t\t\t\t\ty: centerY\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\twidth: boxWidth,\n\t\t\t\theight: boxHeight,\n\t\t\t\tmass: Infinity,\n\t\t\t\tstate: EntityState.Static,\n\t\t\t\trestitution: 0\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tentity.freeze();\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn id;\n\t}\n\t/**\n\t* Add a character to the physics world\n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\t/**\n\t* Add a character entity to the physics world\n\t* \n\t* Creates a physics entity for a character (player or NPC) with proper position handling.\n\t* The owner's x/y signals represent **top-left** coordinates, while the physics entity\n\t* uses **center** coordinates internally.\n\t* \n\t* ## Position System\n\t* \n\t* - `owner.x()` / `owner.y()` → **top-left** corner of the character's hitbox\n\t* - `entity.position` → **center** of the physics collider\n\t* - Conversion: `center = topLeft + (size / 2)`\n\t* \n\t* @param options - Character configuration\n\t* @returns The character's unique ID\n\t* \n\t* @example\n\t* ```ts\n\t* // Player at top-left position (100, 100) with 32x32 hitbox\n\t* // Physics entity will be at center (116, 116)\n\t* this.addCharacter({\n\t*   owner: player,\n\t*   x: 116,  // center X (ignored, uses owner.x())\n\t*   y: 116,  // center Y (ignored, uses owner.y())\n\t*   kind: \"hero\"\n\t* });\n\t* ```\n\t* \n\t* @private\n\t*/\n\taddCharacter(options) {\n\t\tif (!options || typeof options.owner?.id !== \"string\") throw new Error(\"Character requires an owner object with a string id\");\n\t\tconst owner = options.owner;\n\t\tconst id = owner.id;\n\t\tconst hitbox = typeof owner.hitbox === \"function\" ? owner.hitbox() : owner.hitbox;\n\t\tconst width = hitbox?.w ?? 32;\n\t\tconst height = hitbox?.h ?? 32;\n\t\tconst radius = Math.max(width, height) / 2;\n\t\tconst topLeftX = owner.x();\n\t\tconst topLeftY = owner.y();\n\t\tconst centerX = topLeftX + width / 2;\n\t\tconst centerY = topLeftY + height / 2;\n\t\tconst isStatic = !!options.isStatic;\n\t\tconst entity = this.physic.createEntity({\n\t\t\tuuid: id,\n\t\t\tposition: {\n\t\t\t\tx: centerX,\n\t\t\t\ty: centerY\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tradius: Math.max(radius, 1),\n\t\t\twidth,\n\t\t\theight,\n\t\t\tmass: options.mass ?? (isStatic ? Infinity : 1),\n\t\t\tfriction: options.friction ?? .4,\n\t\t\tlinearDamping: isStatic ? 1 : .2,\n\t\t\tmaxLinearVelocity: options.maxSpeed ? options.maxSpeed * this.speedScalar : 200,\n\t\t\trestitution: 0\n\t\t});\n\t\tif (isStatic) entity.freeze();\n\t\telse entity.unfreeze();\n\t\tentity.owner = owner;\n\t\tthis.bindCharacterSignalSync(entity, owner);\n\t\tentity.onDirectionChange(({ cardinalDirection }) => {\n\t\t\tif (!(\"$send\" in this)) return;\n\t\t\tconst owner = entity.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!owner) return;\n\t\t\tif (cardinalDirection === \"idle\") return;\n\t\t\tif (owner.directionFixed) return;\n\t\t\towner.changeDirection(cardinalDirection);\n\t\t});\n\t\tentity.onMovementChange(({ isMoving, intensity }) => {\n\t\t\tif (!(\"$send\" in this)) return;\n\t\t\tconst owner = entity.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!owner) return;\n\t\t\tif (owner.animationFixed) return;\n\t\t\tconst LOW_INTENSITY_THRESHOLD = 10;\n\t\t\tconst hasSetAnimation = typeof owner.setAnimation === \"function\";\n\t\t\tconst animationNameSignal = owner.animationName;\n\t\t\tconst ownerHasAnimationName = animationNameSignal && typeof animationNameSignal === \"object\" && typeof animationNameSignal.set === \"function\";\n\t\t\tif (isMoving && intensity > LOW_INTENSITY_THRESHOLD) {\n\t\t\t\tif (hasSetAnimation) owner.setGraphicAnimation(\"walk\");\n\t\t\t\telse if (ownerHasAnimationName) animationNameSignal.set(\"walk\");\n\t\t\t} else if (!isMoving) {\n\t\t\t\tif (hasSetAnimation) owner.setGraphicAnimation(\"stand\");\n\t\t\t\telse if (ownerHasAnimationName) animationNameSignal.set(\"stand\");\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t});\n\t\tentity.onPositionChange(({ x, y }) => {\n\t\t\tconst currentOwner = entity.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!currentOwner) return;\n\t\t\tconst entityWidth = entity.width || width;\n\t\t\tconst entityHeight = entity.height || height;\n\t\t\tconst topLeftX = x - entityWidth / 2;\n\t\t\tconst topLeftY = y - entityHeight / 2;\n\t\t\tlet changed = false;\n\t\t\tthis.withPhysicsSync(() => {\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof currentOwner.x === \"function\" && typeof currentOwner.x.set === \"function\") {\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrentOwner.x.set(Math.round(topLeftX));\n\t\t\t\t\tchanged = true;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof currentOwner.y === \"function\" && typeof currentOwner.y.set === \"function\") {\n\t\t\t\t\tcurrentOwner.y.set(Math.round(topLeftY));\n\t\t\t\t\tchanged = true;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t});\n\t\t\tif (changed) currentOwner.applyFrames?.();\n\t\t});\n\t\tentity.addResolutionFilter((self, other) => {\n\t\t\tconst selfOwner = self.owner;\n\t\t\tconst otherOwner = other.owner;\n\t\t\tif (!selfOwner || !otherOwner) return true;\n\t\t\tif (selfOwner.z() !== otherOwner.z()) return false;\n\t\t\tif (typeof selfOwner._through === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\t\tif (selfOwner._through() === true) return false;\n\t\t\t} catch {}\n\t\t\telse if (selfOwner.through === true) return false;\n\t\t\tconst playersMap = this.players();\n\t\t\tconst eventsMap = this.events();\n\t\t\tconst isSelfPlayer = !!playersMap[self.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst isOtherPlayer = !!playersMap[other.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst isSelfEvent = !!eventsMap[self.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst isOtherEvent = !!eventsMap[other.uuid];\n\t\t\tconst readScenarioOwnerId = (owner) => {\n\t\t\t\tconst scenarioOwnerId = owner?._scenarioOwnerId ?? owner?.scenarioOwnerId;\n\t\t\t\treturn typeof scenarioOwnerId === \"string\" && scenarioOwnerId.length > 0 ? scenarioOwnerId : void 0;\n\t\t\t};\n\t\t\tconst selfScenarioOwnerId = readScenarioOwnerId(selfOwner);\n\t\t\tconst otherScenarioOwnerId = readScenarioOwnerId(otherOwner);\n\t\t\tif (selfScenarioOwnerId) {\n\t\t\t\tif (isOtherPlayer && other.uuid !== selfScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t\tif (isOtherEvent && otherScenarioOwnerId !== selfScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (otherScenarioOwnerId) {\n\t\t\t\tif (isSelfPlayer && self.uuid !== otherScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t\tif (isSelfEvent && selfScenarioOwnerId !== otherScenarioOwnerId) return false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (isSelfPlayer && isOtherPlayer) {\n\t\t\t\tif (typeof selfOwner._throughOtherPlayer === \"function\") try {\n\t\t\t\t\tif (selfOwner._throughOtherPlayer() === true) return false;\n\t\t\t\t} catch {}\n\t\t\t\telse if (selfOwner.throughOtherPlayer === true) return false;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (isSelfPlayer && isOtherEvent)
